title: chillavali.jar
description: player.data.the owner set to the world true
body:
new version coming soon
![1.0.3 coming soon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bc237bdbcb6c2d22a8d22c980138de0cb729863.png)


**DO NOT TAKE OR STEAL MOD WITHOUT CREDIT**

**i saw on 2 websites that had my mod**



This mod is  work in progress (kinda), so you may see something wrong with entity spawning. It may take too long, but do not worry. This is a horror mod after all. Just do not make Remastered Chillavali Phase 2 angry or you will have to find out what happens

Q How did you come up with the idea of the mod?

A I used Chillavali, put it into a .jar, and that is how I got it

Q What is going to be the rarest entity?

A Remastered Chillavali Phase 2
Probably not, but there is a chance it might be

this mod is not like the broken script or no_moon.jar (kinda)

what this mod is that it take the rule of the mod and has a lot of story

just so you dont know what version work 1.0.1 and 1.0.2.bata work the two version are not the full version 1.0.2 full version is and not 1.0.0 or 1.0.1


**this is the official mod**

**only on modrinth and yes i love my playtester, dev team and everbody (as a friend)**

**(not trying to be weird)**

from the real owner of chillavali.jar
